groups:
The obstacle is the way
- Marcus

We suffer more in imagination
- Seneca

Waste no time on arguments
- Marcus

You have power over your mind
- Marcus

Begin at once to live
- Seneca

Dwell on the beauty of life
- Marcus

Nothing great comes suddenly
- Epictetus

Make the mind tougher by use
- Seneca

Endure and renounce
- Epictetus

Be tolerant with others
- Marcus

Love the hand fate deals you
- Marcus

Life is long if you know how
- Seneca

Caretake this moment
- Epictetus

True happiness is a virtue
- Seneca

Master yourself then others
- Epictetus

Choose not to be harmed
- Marcus

What we do now echoes forever
- Marcus

While we wait life passes
- Seneca

Think of what you have
- Marcus

Every new day is a chance
- Seneca
